comment: Default-FAIL verification contract for T-001 (low, test-after). Populated after the quality gate reran the document-conformance checks recorded in specs/epic-159-pillar-d/verification/T-001/conformance-checks.log (TEST-001..004 / AC-001..004: canonical-source-list, four-check-item, matrix-trailing-column, and checklist-reminder assertions, plus a git-diff proof that existing agent-capability-matrix.md cells are unchanged) together with a fresh re-run of the one unedited suite this task's AC-003 depends on, tests/agent-model-routing.tests.sh (0 failed), both recorded in specs/epic-159-pillar-d/verification/qg/T-001/focused-tests.log, and the epic-159-pillar-d cross-suite regression set (tests/agent-model-routing.tests.sh, tests/agent-capabilities-v2.tests.sh, and tests/model-freshness-check.tests.sh, both bash and pwsh lanes; specs/epic-159-pillar-d/verification/qg/T-001/regression.log). Docs stack waives the three compile-oriented checks (lint/typecheck/build) for this task's Markdown-only Planned Files. Per the implementation report (reports/implementation/epic-159-pillar-d/T-001.md), this task's change is a checklist-style capability-refresh step inside docs/contributor/workflow-detail.md's WFI lifecycle prose plus two trailing confirmation columns on docs/agent-capability-matrix.md's Provider Tier Mapping table; TEST-015 (AC-015) confirms the capability-refresh step is host-neutral prose with no host-specific conditional branch. KNOWN, DOCUMENTED, NON-BLOCKING CONDITION (not a T-001 defect): the epic-159-pillar-d cross-suite regression set's tests/model-freshness-check.tests.sh/.ps1 lanes each show exactly one failure -- TEST-009's AC-011 live-registration assertion. tasks.md's own Commit-A Definition of Done for T-003 explicitly excepts this one assertion as a designed-red condition until a human applies specs/epic-159-pillar-d/human-copy/.github/workflows/test.yml per the epic-136 human-copy procedure (T-003's own verification contract documents this in full); it is unrelated to and unaffected by this task's own docs-only change, and is not cited here as a basis for withholding any of this contract's checks.
